## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI/CD

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python scripts/dev/run_tests.py`
- [ ] `python -m pyflakes cortexnet tests scripts`
- [ ] `python -m build && python -m twine check dist/*`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated relevant docs
- [ ] I kept backward compatibility or documented breakage
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed
